title: Time Travel In Art
definition: The experience of inhabiting the moment of artistic creation or perception, transcending temporal boundaries.

difficulty_levels.beginner: Feeling like you're seeing a painting as it's being created or experiencing what an artist saw at the time of creation.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The sensation of stepping into the artistic process and viewing moments before they were captured on canvas or other medium.
difficulty_levels.expert: A transformative experience that enables viewers to engage with the artistic process as it unfolds, transcending temporal boundaries and offering a glimpse into alternative realities.

extra_fields.insight: Art can provide a window into the past, offering viewers a unique opportunity to connect with the creative process in real-time.
